response.overview: # English Translation  The story follows Izara, a young doctor, and her father Omar, who is the creator of a popular webtoon series, W. When Omar disappears without a trace, Izara's search leads her into the world of the webtoon, where she saves the life of the webtoon's main character, Aliff. In doing so, Izara finds herself written into the story, as the webtoon comes alive and begins to function as a different reality. Aliff is hunting down the man who killed his family ten years ago. He realizes that Izara's fate and his are intertwined, but is unaware that he is a character in a webtoon. When the two worlds collide, various unexpected situations arise that lead to conflict and a love story.
response.title: W: Two Worlds (Viu Malaysia)
